name: Special Egg Foo Yung
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the egg ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Heat a 7-inch skillet with 2 teaspoons oil over medium to high heat.
3. Pour half of the mixture into the pan, spreading it evenly.
4. Cook for 1 1/2 minutes until lightly browned. Flip and cook for another 1 1/2 minutes.
5. Remove from the pan and cook the second half of the mixture. The meat and vegetables can vary, though bean sprouts are a must.
6. Do not let the mixture sit for too long, as it will become watery and should be used immediately.
7. Serve with Egg Foo Yung sauce and rice, if desired.
